jobs.projectDescription: Full tear-off and replacement of ~5,000 SF EPDM membrane on a historic NPS visitor facility. Tapered insulation to correct ponding, new perimeter edge metal, two RTU curbs. Historic building — flashing details coordinated with SHPO.
jobs.keyDates:
Site walk: Jul 8 (recommended)
RFIs due: Jul 12
Bid due: Jul 18, 2:00 PM ET

jobs.projectDescription: Subcontract invite from Reilly. ~18,000 SF TPO over existing metal deck, mechanically attached. Phased summer work, hard completion before school reopens.
jobs.keyDates:
Pre-bid walk: Jul 15
Bid due: Jul 24

jobs.projectDescription: Localized repairs and recoat on a low-slope built-up roof. Smaller scope, quick turnaround.
